name: ENRICHmHealthImplementationGuide
title: ENRICH-mHealth FHIR Implementation Guide
publisher: BIH at Charité - Core Unit Digital Medicine and Interoperability

contact.name: BIH at Charité - Core Unit Digital Medicine and Interoperability

resource.name: Composition BasedOn ServiceRequest
resource.description: Links a Composition to the ServiceRequest it is based on.

resource.name: Encounter 1
resource.description: Encounter which is between patient to practitioner

resource.name: Encounter 2
resource.description: Encounter which is between practitioner to practitioner

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Device Metric (Sensor Type and Calibration Status)
resource.description: Profile for a single metric/sensor of an ENRICH-mHealth Personal Health Device, capturing the sensor type (IEEE 11073 MDC) and its calibration status. Multiple sensors reference one device via `source` (e.g. a smartwatch reporting both pulse and SpO2). Modeled after the gematik HDDT `hddt-sensor-type-and-calibration-status` (DeviceMetric).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Encounter
resource.description: This is the profile of Enocunter within ENRICH-mHealth

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Healthcare Service with Devices
resource.description: A profile for HealthcareService to include references to non-medical devices used in teleconsultation.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Laboruntersuchung-Kreatinin
resource.description: Profile for documenting Creatinin within ENRICH-mHealth.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Arterieller Blutdruck
resource.description: Profile for documenting systemic arterial blood pressure observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKBlutdruckSystemischArteriell (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Atemfrequenz Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting Atemfrequenz observations within ENRICH-mHealth.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation EKG Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting electrocardiogram (EKG/ECG) observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKEKG (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0). Supports wearable single-/multi-lead ECG via SampledData components.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS) Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting the Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS) total score and its eye/verbal/motor sub-scores within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKGCS (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Heart rate Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting Herzfrequenz observations within ENRICH-mHealth.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Koerpergewicht Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting Koerpergewicht observations within ENRICH-mHealth.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Koerpergroesse Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting body height observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKKoerpergroesse (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Koerperkerntemperatur Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting Koerperkerntemperatur observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKKoerperkerntemperatur (renamed from ISiKKoerpertemperatur in ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Kopfumfang Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting head circumference observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKKopfumfang (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Observation Sauerstoffsaettigung (SpO2) Profile
resource.description: Profile for documenting arterial oxygen saturation (SpO2) observations within ENRICH-mHealth. Based on ISiKSauerstoffsaettigungArteriell (ISiK Vitalparameter 6.0.0).

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Patient
resource.description: The profile of the ENRICH Patient

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Personal Health Device
resource.description: Profile for a personal health device (wearable / mHealth / IoT sensor, e.g. smartwatch, ring, patch, scale) that captures ENRICH-mHealth observations. Modeled after the gematik HDDT `hddt-personal-health-device` (Health Device Data Transfer, § 374a SGB V), adapted for the ENRICH research context: the BfARM/HIIS registry requirement of HDDT is intentionally NOT imposed, and manufacturer/type are captured to identify the wearable.

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Procedure
resource.description: This profile explains a Prcedure in ENRICH

resource.name: ENRICH-mHealth Teleconsultation Service Request
resource.description: This profile shows how to create service request for teleconsultation

resource.name: Example ENRICH Arterieller Blutdruck Observation
resource.description: Example instance for documenting systemic arterial blood pressure observations within ENRICH-mHealth (based on ISiKBlutdruckSystemischArteriell).

resource.name: Example of Hypertonus Condition
resource.description: Represents a condition of systemic hypertension

resource.description: SpO2 sensor of the Corsano wearable, with its calibration status.

resource.name: Example-ENRICH-Koerpergroesse
resource.description: An example Observation for body height (based on ISiKKoerpergroesse).

resource.name: Example-ENRICHHerzfrequenz
resource.description: An example Observation for heart rate.

resource.name: Example-ENRICHKoerpergewicht
resource.description: An example Observation for Body Weight.

resource.name: Example-ENRICHKoerpertemperatur
resource.description: An example Observation for body core temperature (based on ISiKKoerperkerntemperatur).

resource.name: Example-ENRICHKopfumfang
resource.description: An example Observation for head circumference.

resource.description: An example Observation for Creatinin.

resource.name: Example-ENRICHSauerstoffsaettigung
resource.description: An example Observation for arterial oxygen saturation (SpO2), e.g. measured by a wearable pulse oximeter.
